$comment: Maps repo paths to security exposure tiers. Used by .github/workflows/security-scan.yml (fleet-shared scan in saga-ed/ci-actions) to prioritize findings. This repo deploys nothing internet-facing itself, but its published @saga-ed/soa-* packages run inside every downstream internet-facing service — so shared package code and the lockfile classify as external while the example/demo apps stay informational.

external.description: No directly deployed internet-facing apps; published packages inherit downstream exposure via shared_paths. Findings here will block PRs in a future release.

internal.description: Example/demo apps and dev tooling, never deployed. Findings here are informational only.

shared_paths.$comment: Published packages and the root lockfile flow into downstream internet-facing services (rostering, program-hub, student-data-system, saga-dash), so treat them as external.
